'''鈭歞-n-th-th''' ('''kadanthethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unaccelerate|unaccelerate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-n-th-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unaccelerate|unaccelerate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-n-th-th
|-
! Lemma
| kadanthethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidanthethoko|thidanthethoko]] || [[word:jidanthethoko|jidanthethoko]] || [[word:shidanthethoko|shidanthethoko]] || [[word:kidanthethoko|kidanthethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudanthethoko|thuthudanthethoko]] || [[word:jujudanthethoko|jujudanthethoko]] || [[word:shushudanthethoko|shushudanthethoko]] || [[word:kukudanthethoko|kukudanthethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudanthethoko|thudanthethoko]] || [[word:judanthethoko|judanthethoko]] || [[word:shudanthethoko|shudanthethoko]] || [[word:kudanthethoko|kudanthethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudanthethoko|thudanthethoko]] || [[word:judanthethoko|judanthethoko]] || [[word:shudanthethoko|shudanthethoko]] || [[word:kudanthethoko|kudanthethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedanthethoko|thedanthethoko]] || [[word:jedanthethoko|jedanthethoko]] || [[word:shedanthethoko|shedanthethoko]] || [[word:kedanthethoko|kedanthethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodanthethoko|thothodanthethoko]] || [[word:jojodanthethoko|jojodanthethoko]] || [[word:shoshodanthethoko|shoshodanthethoko]] || [[word:kokodanthethoko|kokodanthethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodanthethoko|thodanthethoko]] || [[word:jodanthethoko|jodanthethoko]] || [[word:shodanthethoko|shodanthethoko]] || [[word:kodanthethoko|kodanthethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodanthethoko|thodanthethoko]] || [[word:jodanthethoko|jodanthethoko]] || [[word:shodanthethoko|shodanthethoko]] || [[word:kodanthethoko|kodanthethoko]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:danthethoko|danthethoko]] || [[word:danthethoko|danthethoko]] || [[word:danthethoko|danthethoko]] || [[word:danthethoko|danthethoko]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:danthethoko|danthethoko]] || [[word:danthethoko|danthethoko]] || [[word:danthethoko|danthethoko]] || [[word:danthethoko|danthethoko]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:danthethoko|danthethoko]] || [[word:danthethoko|danthethoko]] || [[word:danthethoko|danthethoko]] || [[word:danthethoko|danthethoko]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:danthethoko|danthethoko]] || [[word:danthethoko|danthethoko]] || [[word:danthethoko|danthethoko]] || [[word:danthethoko|danthethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙danthethoko|th忙danthethoko]] || [[word:j忙danthethoko|j忙danthethoko]] || [[word:sh忙danthethoko|sh忙danthethoko]] || [[word:k忙danthethoko|k忙danthethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadanthethoko|thathadanthethoko]] || [[word:jajadanthethoko|jajadanthethoko]] || [[word:shashadanthethoko|shashadanthethoko]] || [[word:kakadanthethoko|kakadanthethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadanthethoko|thadanthethoko]] || [[word:jadanthethoko|jadanthethoko]] || [[word:shadanthethoko|shadanthethoko]] || [[word:kadanthethoko|kadanthethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadanthethoko|thadanthethoko]] || [[word:jadanthethoko|jadanthethoko]] || [[word:shadanthethoko|shadanthethoko]] || [[word:kadanthethoko|kadanthethoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadanthethithi|shadanthethithi]] || [[word:shadanthethiji|shadanthethiji]] || [[word:shadanthethishi|shadanthethishi]] || [[word:shadanthethiki|shadanthethiki]]
